scripts.start:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = [int]($env:PORT); if (-not $p) { $p = 5000 }; $listeningPids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($owningPid in $listeningPids) { if ($owningPid -gt 0) { Get-Process -Id $owningPid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; node server.js"
